responses: Hello! How can I help you with college info?
Hi there! Ask me about admissions, fees, placements, or courses.
Welcome! What would you like to know about our college?
You're welcome! Visit our website for more details.
Goodbye! Feel free to return anytime.
Happy to help! Have a great day!

patterns: what do I need for admission?
how can I get into this college
responses: Minimum 60% in 12th grade. Entrance exam required for engineering/medical courses.
You need 10+2 with 55%+ marks. Specific requirements vary by department.
Admission requires passing entrance exam and interview for most programs.
Annual fee is Rs 1,20,000 for most courses. Scholarships available for meritorious students.
Fees vary by course. Engineering: Rs 1.5L/year, MBA: Rs 2L/year, BSc: Rs 80k/year.
Payment can be made in installments. Hostel fees extra: Rs 60k/year.
95% placement rate. Average package: Rs 8.5 LPA. Highest: Rs 45 LPA (2024).
Top recruiters: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte. 200+ companies visit annually.
Placement cell provides training. 90% of eligible students placed last year.
We offer B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, BCA, MCA, BSc, and PhD programs.
Engineering branches: CS, IT, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics.
Management courses: MBA in Marketing, Finance, HR, Business Analytics.
Yes! Merit scholarships up to 100% for top performers. Need-based aid available.
Government scholarships for reserved categories. Apply through college office.
Sports quota scholarships for national level players.
Library is open from 8 AM to 12 AM (midnight), 7 days a week. Digital library available 24/7.
Hostels have gym, common room, mess with vegetarian food. Separate for boys/girls.
Canteen offers healthy food. Medical facility available on campus from 9 AM to 5 PM.
24/7 WiFi campus, AC classrooms, modern labs, sports complex with cricket/football ground.
Mid-term exams: September 15-25, 2026. Final exams: December 1-15, 2026.
Practical exams start 1 week before theory exams. Check your department notice board.
Exam schedule is released 1 month before exams. Download from student portal.
Summer break: May 15 - July 10, 2026. Winter break: Dec 25 - Jan 5, 2027.
Major holidays: Diwali (Nov 5-8), Holi (March 18), Independence Day (Aug 15), Republic Day (Jan 26).
College remains closed on 2nd Saturdays and national holidays.
College bus service available from 15+ locations. Bus pass: Rs 8,000/semester.
College is well-connected by city buses (Route 101, 102, 105). Metro station 2 km away.
Private vans and shared autos available from railway station and bus depot.
Hostel fees: Rs 60,000 per year (twin sharing). Single room: Rs 80,000/year. Mess fees: Rs 25,000/semester.
Hostel rules: In-time 9 PM, biometric attendance, no visitors after 8 PM, no non-veg food in rooms, maintain cleanliness.
Hostel facilities: 24/7 WiFi, gym, common room with TV, washing machines, RO water, 24/7 security with CCTV.
Hostel application deadline: July 15th. Limited seats on first-come basis. Medical certificate required.
Sports facilities: Cricket ground (2), Football ground, Basketball court (3), Volleyball court (2), Tennis court, Swimming pool (50m), Gymnasium with modern equipment.
Indoor sports: Table tennis, Badminton (4 courts), Chess, Carrom, Yoga room, Boxing ring.
Sports quota: 5% seats reserved. National level players get full scholarship. University-level players get 50% fee waiver.
Sports coach available: Former national players for cricket, football, basketball. Practice timings: 6-8 AM and 4-7 PM.
We have 250+ faculty members. 85% hold PhDs from IITs/NITs/IIITs. Student-faculty ratio: 15:1.
Departments: Computer Science (25 faculty), Mechanical (20), Civil (18), Electrical (15), MBA (12), Sciences (30+).
Faculty achievements: 500+ research papers published, 25 patents, 10 Best Teacher awards, collaborations with MIT, Stanford.
Regular guest lectures by industry experts from Google, Microsoft, Amazon. Visiting faculty from IITs every semester.
Strong alumni network of 25,000+ members worldwide. Alumni working at Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Goldman Sachs, NASA.
Alumni Association: Annual meet every December. Regional chapters in US, UK, Canada, Australia, Singapore.
Alumni benefits: Mentorship program, referral for jobs, startup funding, networking events, library access after graduation.
Notable alumni: Sundar (Google India Head), Priya (Microsoft Senior Director), Rajesh (CEO of TechStart).
Internship opportunities: 90% students get internships. Summer internships (May-July), Winter internships (Dec-Jan).
Top internship recruiters: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, KPMG, Infosys, TCS, Goldman Sachs, Adobe.
Average stipend: Rs 25,000-40,000/month. Some international internships offer up to $3,000/month.
Internship process: Apply via placement cell. Resume workshops, mock interviews, company-specific training provided.
Mandatory internship for 3rd year students (6-8 weeks). Industry training integrated in curriculum for all branches.
